extract: Raticate (Japanese: ラッタ Ratta) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Rattata starting at level 20. In Alola, Raticate has a dual-type Dark/Normal regional form: Alolan Raticate. It evolves from Alolan Rattata when leveled up at night starting at level 20. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
